text:
Removed

Update to robocode-1.8.0.0

Changed

                SF/nemysisfreebsdp/:icons

                ${PORTNAME}.png:icons

EXTRACT_ONLY=   ${PORTNAME}-${DISTVERSION}-setup.jar

DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Robocode" "${COMMENT}" \
                "${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png" \
                "${PORTNAME}" "Game;StrategyGame;" false
